Crystal Poachers are poachers who illegally mine Death Crystals on Forbodulon Prime. A trio of crystal poachers were killed by Rick Sanchez while he was illegally mining his own Death Crystals.

Crystal Poachers came to be with the high value of Death Crystals on the black market. They travelled to Forbodulon Prime and mined as many crystals as they could carry, while armed with guns to attack other crystal miners. The poachers attacked Rick and Morty Smith once they discovered the duo, but Rick killed them all with ease by using a death crystal to predict when they were reloading their guns.
